name: kobodl-toolkit
description: Kobo e-book library toolkit — search your library by title / author / series / publication date / category / description text / reading status / language, download chosen books as DRM-free EPUBs via subdavis/kobo-book-downloader, and convert downloaded EPUBs into chunked-by-chapter Markdown for LLM ingestion (book → skill workflow). Optional Calibre PDF conversion. macOS / Linux.
